[{"Name":"Richard Fleming","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVozYx2z5DuL4vCd_b6wRfo0eziVzrzFPr4JjM2xOsj94Pu99Tx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I've dealt with Shepherds home hardware for over 25 years and until recently have always been very happy with their service. About a month ago my wife hired the design team to install a counter top in our home we were renovating to sell. Things went well until after the install when we discovered the sink hole was wrong, the caulking was extremely bad and the walls were all damaged. When my wife called to show pictures and complain she got totally blown off by the sales man even tho he admitted he didn't even inspect the work. I called and talked with the manager who informed me his team had done nothing wrong. I ended up having to hire someone to come in and fix their mess. I rated them a 3 only due to their good service in pervious years but Highly Recomend you go elsewhere for your counter top needs.
Update June 11th... I met with Daryl the retail sales manager today at the store. He listened to my concerns,  emphasised that he wished my experience had been dealt with differently. As a manager myself i know that sometimes situations go off the rails. Once thats happened, what's important is how we deal with the fallout. In the end Daryl restored my faith in Shepherds Home Hardware.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEL-W05GX5d-LEQ&fid=0x0:0x91ce1cb4e54eed11"],"When":"2025-6-5"},{"Name":"Steve Breeze","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVOX3ocgJTxcQ8L9Zp9iRnZ1nONBCN39uKGktt2tynp8uDdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I didn't catch her name, but. He was kind, knowledgeable, efficient, and most of all his # 1 priority was to make sure I was happy with the job.  He even cleaned my skylight windows after the job was completed.  He got rid of some wasp nests which were on the top peaks for me as well.  He worked non-stop on my 9/12 pitch roof in the heat and smoke, not a complaint was heard.  Colton's wing man Bobby was also high energy and a great guy with a great attitude. They worked around other trades people on site at the same time and they handled everything so professional with the other trades.   Skylar, who worked on my quote was one of the best sales persons I have ever worked with, efficient and got my quote done quickly and touched bases with me when needed.  I can't say enough about the service and quality of their work and would recommend them to anyone in a minute.  Thanks for a great job guys!  Jill Hatt","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnsc1I-I2JTJSbBEXN1h1b&fid=0x0:0xee2f0216553d11ea"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Craig Spanza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJrri8T9T_m3Vyxc8H4_8-NHWHwF8n4QoxSD-OBhzZiZVhVo5w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As a repeat customer of Energy Economics is goes without saying I am pleased with them.   I believe they truly want to deliver the best product and experience possible.   When it came time to sell my house with the first system the prospective buyers were nervous about how the system worked and how to deal with any problems so I put them in touch with my rep at Energy Economics and he gave them the reassurance they needed about the system and my house was sold!   When I moved in to my new house in the Kootenays I was happy to discover they had operations here as well!   When other companies got cold feet about installing my system in -30C weather on a snowy roof with a 1:1 pitch Energy Economics showed up with the equipment and knowhow to do the job efficiently and safely in these conditions.   Overall I was most impressed with how they conducted their business every step of the way.  My new 18kw system quietly sits there and is feeding all my home and electric vehicle needs independent of the market prices of electricity and gasoline combined.   I feel like I'm living in the future.   :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDi5wv9zIT6HkEWqPcFoWDM&fid=0x0:0xee2f0216553d11ea"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Dave Boreen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXo0eqqYmd51TiVemKUDFr031WdswfGjF-da4keScOZU4ssfcHp=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great experience with Energy Economics for our solar panel system installation. The house looks completely different!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steven H.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlb7AYxSbEI_i763INve8bJaoWiI8dhL4da921jOcoEIRBFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very knowledgeable and professional service. I can highly recommend them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Neil Lipinski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWE4gafaONEnMjrGT-QCvHcquUA4B0mPyXCcSpKbRqM_gBvO39n=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Energy Economics is great. Their communication was excellent along the whole renovation process. I would highly recommend Hunters Exteriors.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDxck4qAqEC25mE0zL8Om9j&fid=0x0:0xa50e3647367ff6b2"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Dave Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYXDhjLsJxTXbto7-75tOo-Fn4au5UOiJ0AqDUtoB6XHSCD1Tvmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I couldn't be happier with Jesse and his team at Hunter Exteriors.

I needed repairs done to some damaged siding, and I wanted to have my roof peaks changed to make them more contemporary looking with less maintenance (as anyone with cedar on a house in the Okanagan would understand).  I also needed my eavestroughs cleaned & my roof treated for moss... all the usual stuff for a 20-year-old house.

Jesse was extremely helpful (and very patient!) throughout the planning process, and the guys did a fantastic job from start to finish. Their work site was clean, they were very safety conscious, and they were very professional the entire time they were here.

I love the new look of my house, and I'll be happy to work with them again when it comes time for a new roof & siding a few years down the road.  Thanks everyone!

(Some before & after photos attached)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMzd6t5-XVE05_g7SGmyPk&fid=0x0:0xa50e3647367ff6b2"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Nik Roughton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPvbJurzfjasK29rgnAh6e-I5AX-TrshJO1NLd5pgDlAuCgMo1vA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely a phenomenal experience dealing with Jesse and his team at Hunter Exteriors. I would highly recommend to anyone looking for a fair and honest contractor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBs8hOOJK4iYZ4wW0HtG8Za&fid=0x0:0x7d50e0524797d530"],"When":"2026-3-3"},{"Name":"Denis Dombrowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4y1wns0hs27RY2N-JnkZ0mQlSFesU5pUDYf_53FyxmgpPcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"28 years ago we had our house roof shingles put on by Crown Roofing, a Vernon Company owned by Randy Todosychuk.  We were extremely pleased with his work.
Now in 2026 we needed to replace our shingles and eavestroughs again.  We started our search for a reputable company to do this and were surprised to find out that Randy was still doing business in Vernon but now it is a family business with Randy as their roofing manager. The name of their company is North OKGN Construction.
Because of our previous experience with Randy we hired them to do our roof and eavestroughs and were not disappointed.  From start to finish the job was done exactly like the contract that we agreed to with Randy overseeing the job. He used 2 excellent roofers doing the work that took 4 days to complete.  Randy was at the jobsite every day making sure it was done correctly.
Thanks for your professionalism.
We highly recommend North OKN Construction for any of your roofing needs.
Denis and Mary Dombrowski, Vernon, B.C.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"James R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiuO3Zc1b5Qz-f77zo2agQfrnYDVJVP2MA2u0vW8ZIvTx_tg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From quoting to completion, the team were excellent to work with. They fit our roof job in even though they were very busy and went above and beyond to get it done. Friendly, professional and we didn't have to lift a finger. Would highly recommend and will definitely use them again if we need any type of service they provide.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Willis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9I5LkbGUxyt5Uapjr4rQt_XTzsknJyVFj-iHCdamm6MkqHFHF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We called and Randy Sr responded, in a big way.  We had some damage from a windstorm and thought he was coming by to have a peek and suggest a time to do the repair. Well, he got the ladder out, got up on the roof and badda boom…fixed.  He also noticed some bent damage that we were not aware of and will be taking care of that.
SUPER IMPRESSED!
5 star recommendation.
John Willis","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mike B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRFVf2_tEtpmM97Jh5W4kOMzWhi7Wa6ZeTL3neO9q6qkNGMA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Honest people, great communication, showed pictures of the work completed, very professional repair. I will use North OKGN Construction again, and will recommend to others.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gordon Passmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUW0ocQjkLlYJH1_jLXLZUb8P4ZoP2IAc6OfwdzrEfCwxzuwuCDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Where to start.  Firstly Randy is super approachable and just such a down to earth guy.  Easy to talk to, prompt, and explains things in a way that made sense to me (I’m not a trades guy).  I told him directly, to his face, that I was looking for a quality product, that will last, and at a reasonable price.  And boy did his team delivery.

They put together a detailed, easy to follow, and well laid out quote for the requested service plus additional services that I may benefit from.  All of which were clearly labelled and with some explanation (again, I’m not a trades guy) easy to understand.

I quickly made the decision to go with this company, payment was easy, communication was proactive, timely, and relevant.  They did a terrific job managing expectations and ensuring I knew what was happening.

When they arrived on site and throughout the project everyone was pleasant and friendly.  Even my kiddo remarked how friendly the workers were.  The team absolutely flew through this project, including replacing… the roof boards? I have already forgot what the wood planks are called, and the shingles, in 3.5 business days.  The final price came in slightly below quoted, which was not expected but a stunning surprise.  Not only was the quality of work exceptional but they cleaned up quickly and thoroughly.  You can’t even tell they were here.  And again, they use direct debit to your account which makes payment super easy.

Everything about the customer experience has been meticulously thought of and executed.  They don’t leave anything to chance.  Stop reading reviews and just hire this company, they truly are phenomenal.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Russell Bula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxOXqWtjE8BCye0u7nSz6NYGd2WLioQtYhjgA3YaAZFclALQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Randy and his team were a delight to work with over the 2 weeks they re-sided our 2500 sqft bungalow. The quality of their work is outstanding and small changes we requested along the way were handled without issue or delay. Of particular importance to us was that they stayed on the job until it was finished and it was completed to our satisfaction in the time Randy said it would take. They left the entire property clean of building scraps and packaging materials. Even our neighbors remarked that we chose an excellent contractor for this job.
We definitely would recommend North OKGN Construction for any roofing or siding project .","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Storm Proof Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jaime Martins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIpnTacGHFGv-Qn5VqyfVQVA3jwMYt51t1TyINvzX5lMeTWcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have been so happy with Damien and his team getting a roof done at my mother‘s house as well as another roof at my own. A few of the things for me that distinguish professionals is consistency, transparency, and integrity. Throughout this entire process, Damien consulted with us, ensured we were comfortable with the proposal, checked in often, and while working pointed out issues that were critical (formally incorrectly, installed venting) that two other vendors ignored and covered up in prior work. Damien‘s expertise in, quite literally, storm proofing a home was apparent given the quality of materials used, and the waterproofing system installed. I couldn’t be happier!
His team were incredibly polite and considerate, working diligently, and obviously proud of the work they were doing. It was such a pleasure to have them and I am so incredibly happy with the look of my new roof and how clean they left the job site. I got incredible value for the investment and feel like I can relax for the next many decades at least! Thank you, Damien and team! 10/10!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maxime Lessard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkol1Fl8hAUL-yGAiOmvSx7jIHsraUVP9FCQTK_zeLhvWNmg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damian and his crew replaced our roof about a month ago. The job was very well done and our home looks pretty sharp now with black shingle. Damian was very transparent in is work and communicated the work to be done. The price was competitive and the crew left the place very clean and picked up any nails left on the yard. All good stuff here, I recommend giving him a shout for a quote.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Fitzgerald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMwBiVEZU1LJ9qsIXk2Ow-SMwDPTJ7qRT6vJMZe8ifWWNKydk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We are extremely pleased with the work Storm Proof Roofing did for us. Damien came out to look at a minor issue with the roof on our previous house and gave us his advice for no cost. We moved and the new house needed a roof replacement so we got Damien to give us a quote and approximate schedule. We got other quotes as he suggested and because of our previous interaction with him we decided to have Storm Proof do the work. They advised us of the start date about a month ahead and started on that date, they told us how long it would take and stuck to their timeline. They told us the cost and stuck to their quote. All in all a very professional organization. Damien and his employees seem genuinely happy to be doing the work and do an excellent job with care and skill. After they finished the job site was spotless and my roof looks fantastic. I have a roofing inspector in the family and he told me "They did a really good job!"
Thank you Damien and crew.
We wholeheartedly recommend Storm Proof Roofing, choosing them was one of the best decisions I have made.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp596GgQE&fid=0x0:0x853499c4fc9e4658"],"When":"2023-8-30"},{"Name":"Harold Schroth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5eIhiKo43V14Yg2aTqI2qoZ370BIKXxNOLuyZYxyocneVUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are looking for a high quality roofing job, call Damien - it’s his attention to detail that makes the difference on how your roof performs over the long-term.  More nails per shingle, W flashing in the valleys, diverter pieces so rain goes in the gutter instead rotting your facia plus much more… it all adds up to you still being confident about your roof many years from now.  His crew is polite and courteous and they clean-up meticulously after the job is done.  This is the company you want to call!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michael Mckerracher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKGUK2w6RGm7HSXnWJduWiIP3y_aV135p6tlo6IUR5aessEFVs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damien helped me last minute after a windstorm ripped some tiles off my roof. Highly recommend","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marin Carruthers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLuOzKL7d6VSeE89jT2U7bpnGjBhcK6d9qeJGPNAgNE-m7ucQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an excellent experience with this roofing company from start to finish. Most importantly, the roof looks absolutely amazing, and the quality of work truly shows. We would highly recommend them to anyone looking for professional, reliable, and high-quality roofing work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jess Leboe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXh7Rbb2KZlPz9uFKTuBbUPRKmY4d6k2K4YeJ-x1b8W-9gOMss=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Damien and his crew at Storm Proof Roofing did exceptional work on our roof! They were very professional through the whole process. Great attention to detail, and a customer-centric approach made the entire experience seamless and stress-free. From initial consultation to final inspection, he showed a commitment to quality and excellence that's hard to find. Their friendly, courteous service made us feel valued and confident in their abilities. I highly recommend Storm Proof Roofing to anyone seeking a reliable, trustworthy, and skilled roofing company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mark Jacobsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7Smh9qQy098kxxDQXFkHGfizSuJTF37J3iV6U1b8hjJqPjA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot recommend Damien and Storm Proof Roofing enough. On top of that, the pricing was fair. This was not even his installation, and he pointed out the problems with the workmanship that led to the problems and how they do things differently to avoid such problems. So, you can be confident if you go with Storm Proof, you will not be dealing with the consequences of substandard work. I know I won’t be calling anyone else for our future needs. I can’t say enough about their responsiveness and attention to detail.","Images":null,"When":""}]
